sections.title: Summary of Existing Coverage
sections.content:
| Area | File | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Payroll engine core | `PayrollEngineServiceTest.php` | Partial |
| Statutory calculators (SSS/PH/PI/BIR) | `StatutoryCalculatorsTest.php` | Good |
| 13th Month pay | `ThirteenthMonthServiceTest.php` | Partial |
| Money utility | `MoneyTest.php` | Good |
| **Everything else** | — | **0% coverage** |

---

sections.title: Gap 1 — Authentication Controller (0% covered)
Gap 2 — Employee CRUD & Repository (0% covered)
Gap 3 — ESS Leave & Attendance (0% covered)
Gap 4 — Payroll Run Service (0% covered)
Gap 5 — Payroll Engine: Uncovered Combinations
Gap 6 — 13th Month: Uncovered Edge Cases
Gap 7 — Statutory Calculators: Boundary Values
Gap 8 — HasUuid Trait (0% covered)
Gap 9 — Route Guards / Authorization (0% covered)
Gap 10 — Integration: Full Payroll Flow (0% covered)
Prioritized Remediation Order
sections.content:
| Priority | Gap | Risk if Untested |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Authentication (login, MFA, logout) | Auth bypass goes undetected |
| 2 | Payroll run service (batch execution) | Wrong payslips silently issued |
| 3 | ESS Leave (balance deduction) | Employees granted leave they lack balance for |
| 4 | Authorization middleware | Privilege escalation |
| 5 | Full payroll integration flow | Regression across period→run→finalize |
| 6 | Payroll engine edge cases (OT-on-holiday, late, loan) | Pay calculation errors |
| 7 | Employee CRUD (filters, soft-delete) | Data corruption, ghost records |
| 8 | Statutory boundary values | Off-by-one in bracket selection |
| 9 | 13th month edge cases (zero payslips, draft exclusion) | Incorrect bonus payout |
| 10 | HasUuid trait | UUID collision or override bugs |

**Frontend:** Zero test infrastructure exists. The highest-value first step would be adding Vitest + React Testing Library and covering `web/src/lib/money.ts`, `web/src/routes/Guards.tsx`, and the Zod validation schemas in form modals — three pure-logic targets with no DOM dependencies.
